name: 宮女搶食太子膳食
description: 女主放棄勸食策略，直接坐下來大吃太子的飯菜，用飢餓感和美食的誘惑來激將太子。這個場景打破了宮廷劇中宮女卑微恭順的刻板印象，製造了強烈的喜劇效果和人物魅力。
tags: 身份越軌行為的冒險感——她隨時可能被處死，卻在太子面前大快朵頤

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: This woman, does she actually dare to try and force feed me? ... Your highness, you should peacefully continue your hunger strike and I'll take care of this food for you. Don't worry. I definitely won't tell anyone that I ate it. It's a win-win for both of us.
examples.context: 身份越軌行為的冒險感——她隨時可能被處死，卻在太子面前大快朵頤
